title: Author an on_mount hook that ensures authentication
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/user_auth.ex (module MyAppWeb.UserAuth) with an on_mount/4 clause on_mount(:ensure_authenticated, _params, session, socket) that returns {:halt, redirect(socket, to: ~p"/login")} when session has no "user_token", and {:cont, assign(socket, :current_user, MyApp.Accounts.get_user_by_session_token(token))} otherwise. Module must `import Phoenix.Component` and `import Phoenix.LiveView`.
tier_rationale: Canonical on_mount hook pattern straight from Phoenix auth generator.
